name: Sour Cream-Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, cornstarch, lemon rind, juice, egg yolks, and milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until thickened.
3. Stir in butter and allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Stir in sour cream and pour the filling into the pie shell.
5. Cover with whipped cream.
6. Garnish with lemon twists.
7. Store in the refrigerator.
